overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a futuristic cyberpunk game showing a rainy night in a neon-lit city. The camera follows various pedestrians with umbrellas through wet streets, under massive overpasses, and up into elevated walkways, showcasing dense urban architecture with holographic advertisements and reflective wet surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city sidewalk with palm trees and covered walkway

events.description: pedestrian with green umbrella passes in front of camera view
slight turn to follow yellow umbrella pedestrian toward intersection

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian with a yellow umbrella along the wet reflective sidewalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with yellow umbrella walking ahead on the sidewalk
pedestrian in red vest and black pants walking opposite direction

tall palm trees lining the center of the pedestrian walkway
tall glass and steel skyscraper with illuminated windows in the background
massive concrete and metal overpass structure spanning across the street ahead
rain-slicked tiled sidewalk with yellow tactile paving strips reflecting neon lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy night in a futuristic city, following a pedestrian with a yellow umbrella along a wet sidewalk lined with palm trees. The camera moves steadily forward beneath a massive overpass structure, passing other pedestrians with umbrellas while concrete railings line the left side and glass buildings rise in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street under elevated highway with parking garage

events.description: yellow umbrella pedestrian exits to the right, camera continues straight under overpass
red delivery van drives past on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk under the overpass after losing sight of the yellow umbrella pedestrian

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with dark umbrella walking ahead under the overpass
red van driving along the wet street with headlights on

entered.detail: large multi-level parking structure with open concrete floors and parked vehicles visible
underside of massive concrete highway overpass with structural beams and lighting

segments.scene_description: The yellow umbrella pedestrian exits the frame as the camera moves deeper under the overpass, transitioning from open sky to a sheltered concrete environment. A multi-story parking garage dominates the right side while vehicles including a red van drive past on the wet street, and the camera begins following a new pedestrian with a dark umbrella.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under highway with graffiti walls

events.description: beginning to follow new pedestrian with purple glowing umbrella
approaching staircase entrance at end of underpass

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian with a purple illuminated umbrella through the underpass

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with purple glowing umbrella walking ahead
black sedan driving on the wet road alongside the walkway

entered.detail: concrete wall covered with colorful graffiti and street art under the overpass
concrete staircase entrance leading upward to elevated walkway

segments.scene_description: The camera follows a distinctive pedestrian with a purple glowing umbrella through a narrow, graffiti-covered underpass. The space is fully enclosed by the overpass ceiling above and concrete walls on the left, with traffic continuing to flow on the right. The segment ends as the camera approaches a staircase leading upward.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated indoor pedestrian corridor with glass walls

events.description: ascending stairs from outdoor underpass into enclosed elevated walkway
entering fully enclosed corridor with fluorescent ceiling lighting

agents.ego_description: climbing the stairs following the purple umbrella pedestrian into an elevated indoor corridor

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with purple umbrella ascending the stairs ahead
pedestrian in white shirt and blue pants walking up the stairs

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with yellow edge markings leading upward
transparent glass safety railing along the left side of the stairs
enclosed pedestrian walkway with tiled floors and overhead lighting

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a wide concrete staircase following the purple umbrella pedestrian, transitioning from the rainy outdoor underpass to a dry, enclosed elevated walkway. Glass railings line the stairs, and the segment concludes in a well-lit indoor corridor with other pedestrians walking ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy cyberpunk cityscape that transitions from an open street into a sheltered underpass and finally into a dry elevated corridor. It begins by following a pedestrian with a yellow umbrella along a wet, palm-lined sidewalk beneath a massive overpass, moving steadily forward past glass buildings and concrete railings. As the yellow umbrella exits the frame, the camera pushes deeper into the sheltered concrete environment, passing a multi-story parking garage and a red van before shifting its focus to a pedestrian with a dark umbrella. The scene then narrows into a graffiti-covered underpass where the camera follows a person with a glowing purple umbrella through the enclosed space. Finally, the camera ascends a wide concrete staircase with glass railings, leaving the rain behind to enter a well-lit, indoor elevated walkway filled with pedestrians.
